title: youtube-notetaker：从视频生成笔记的开源技能
full_text:
elvis on X: "Excited to share my new agent skill.
/youtube-notetaker generates Artifacts from YT videos.
Captures slides, notes, transcription, and whatever you want.
Open-source, and you can customize it as you please. https://t.co/uG1HHVEAxF" / X
